name: PT. Borneo Olah Sarana Sukses Tbk
summary: PT. Borneo Olah Sarana Sukses Tbk operates as a coal exploration and production company in Indonesia. The company's mining assets are located in Muara Pahu, Kutai Barat, and East Kalimantan regions. It exports its products to Japan, South Korea, the United States, the Philippines, Thailand, Vietnam, India, and Bangladesh. PT. Borneo Olah Sarana Sukses Tbk is based in West Jakarta, Indonesia.
